sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12331" key="a)pogalhno/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπογᾰληνόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n12331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calm down,</tr_> of physical disturbances, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
